TextView.android:text:
Nutritional advice helps you make healthy food choices that provide your body with the nutrients it needs to stay healthy and active.

 💧 Drink Plenty of Water
 Water keeps your body hydrated and helps it function properly. Aim to drink enough water throughout the day.

🥗 Eat a Balanced Diet
Include fruits, vegetables, whole grains, lean proteins, and healthy fats in your meals for balanced nutrition.

🍎 Eat More Fruits and Vegetables
Fruits and vegetables provide vitamins, minerals, and fiber that support good health.

🍬 Limit Sugar
 Reduce sugary drinks and snacks to help maintain healthy teeth and a healthy weight.

🧂 Reduce Salt Intake
Eating less salt can help keep your blood pressure at a healthy level.

🍽️ Watch Portion Sizes
Eating the right amount of food helps maintain a healthy weight and prevents overeating.
